description_long: This pumping station consists of a rectangular, industrial-style building with a flat roof, situated on a concrete pad and flanked by two parallel pipelines extending from either side. The main structure is predominantly gray, with a smaller annex and a fenced-in area containing visible equipment and piping. The front features a partially open framework, possibly for maintenance access, and a small landscaped section with greenery. The roof is mostly featureless, except for a few minor protrusions and utility boxes. The overall design is utilitarian, with clear separation between the operational and access areas, and the station is set up for integration with urban infrastructure such as roads or railways.
description: A gray, industrial pumping station with a flat roof, dual pipelines, and a fenced equipment area on a concrete base.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the pipelines and the main building's flat roof.
description_view_1: End view highlighting the annex, fenced equipment area, and landscaped section.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with a clear look at the open framework and the main entrance area.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the back wall of the building and the continuation of the pipelines.
attribute_security_fencing: One partial metal fence section enclosing equipment on the side, approximately 1.5 meters high.
